name: Koreayo Content Pipeline v9 - Integrated Bidirectional Linking

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", temperature: 0.6, response_format: { type: "json_object" }, messages: [{ role: "system", content: $json.draft_system_prompt }, { role: "user", content: $json.draft_user_prompt }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", max_tokens: 8192, system: $json.qa_system_prompt, messages: [{ role: "user", content: $json.qa_user_prompt }] }) }}

parameters.jsCode: return { topic_id: $json.topic_id || '', published_url: $json.wp_link || '', published_at: new Date().toISOString(), category: $json.category || '', subcategory: $json.subcategory || '', primary_keyword: $json.seed_keyword || '', title: $json.final_title || '', language: $json.language || '', wp_post_id: String($json.wp_id || ''), slug: $json.final_slug || '' };

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const r = $json.row_number; return JSON.stringify({ valueInputOption: 'USER_ENTERED', data: [{ range: `QUEUE!A${r}`, values: [[$json.topic_id || '']] }, { range: `QUEUE!B${r}`, values: [['processing']] }] }); })() }}

={{ (() => { const r = $json.row_number; return JSON.stringify({ valueInputOption: 'USER_ENTERED', data: [{ range: `QUEUE!A${r}`, values: [[$json.topic_id || '']] }, { range: `QUEUE!B${r}`, values: [[$json.status || '']] }, { range: `QUEUE!V${r}`, values: [[$json.published_url || '']] }, { range: `QUEUE!Y${r}`, values: [[$json.qa_score || 0]] }, { range: `QUEUE!Z${r}`, values: [[$json.qa_decision || '']] }] }); })() }}

={{ (() => { const r = $json.row_number; return JSON.stringify({ valueInputOption: 'USER_ENTERED', data: [{ range: `QUEUE!B${r}`, values: [[$json.status || '']] }, { range: `QUEUE!X${r}`, values: [[$json.retry_count || 0]] }, { range: `QUEUE!AB${r}`, values: [[$json.last_error || '']] }] }); })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-4o-mini", temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: "json_object" }, messages: [{ role: "system", content: $json.ai_system_prompt }, { role: "user", content: $json.ai_user_prompt }] }) }}

parameters.text:
=:information_source: *양방향 링크 스킵*

*사유:* {{ $json.reason || 'No related posts or already linked' }}
